text: I feel a peculiar tension as I pass from the cool sterility of the corridor into the vibrant, idea-filled space of research and development. The empty hallway evokes a sense of anticipation and minor unease, while the exhibition beyond feels intellectually stimulating and inviting. Here, contemplation and innovation swirl together, inviting me to question how I connect and evolve alongside machines. I am both intrigued and slightly unsettled by the contrast.
